name: STEWED TOMATOES and BLACK-EYED PEAS with CORNBREAD CROUTONS

ingredients.item: 1½ cups dried black-eyed peas, sorted and soaked in water overnight
ingredients.original: 1½ cups dried black-eyed peas, sorted and soaked in water overnight

ingredients.item: ½ cup finely diced yellow onion
ingredients.original: ½ cup finely diced yellow onion

ingredients.item: ¼ cup finely diced celery, strings removed
ingredients.original: ¼ cup finely diced celery, strings removed

ingredients.item: 1 teaspoon Creole spice blend, homemade or store-bought
ingredients.original: 1 teaspoon Creole spice blend, homemade or store-bought

ingredients.item: 1 (28-ounce) can plum tomatoes with juices, halved lengthwise
ingredients.original: 1 (28-ounce) can plum tomatoes with juices, halved lengthwise

ingredients.item: 1 cup vegetable stock, homemade or store-bought
ingredients.original: 1 cup vegetable stock, homemade or store-bought
